summary: Iter 47 full backend + frontend validation of (1) POST /api/event-planner/best-fit resolver, (2) Landing Hero AI Planner strip, (3) Planner 'Add all to cart' one-tap flow with localStorage seeding, (4) BookingFlow Step-5 refactor into <PaymentStep />. Backend 9/9 pytest green — happy path, seeded artists (Priya + DJ Vortex + Dhiren) all matched=true, empty-categories→400, dedupe across categories, national city fallback (Guwahati→Delhi DJ), busy-day filter (booking confirmed via mock Razorpay OTP 123456 correctly returns matched=false), suggest+counter-removed+batch regressions all pass. Frontend end-to-end: hero-planner-strip present between .hero-sub and .hero-cta-row, contains 'AI Event Planner', navigates to /planner. /planner submit → plan renders → 'Add all 5 to my cart' button visible → click seeds localStorage bt_event_cart_<primary> with items+saved_at+from_planner:true and navigates unauth users to /login (through /book) — cart already persisted. Authenticated customer@booktalent.com repeat: [data-testid=booking-cart] renders with 2 artists (Priya PRIMARY + DJ Vortex), Welcome-back toast fires ('✓ Welcome back — 1 artist still in your event cart'), progresses through steps 1→5. Step-5 PaymentStep verified: pay-card/pay-upi/pay-netbanking chips clickable and toggle .selected; payment-gateway-banner shows test-mode copy; pay-now-btn = '🔐 Pay ₹3,593 to Confirm' single-artist AND '🔐 Pay ₹5,953 to Confirm · 2 artists' multi-artist; step5-back returns to step 4. Refactor sanity: BookingFlow.jsx=1049 lines (≤1060), PaymentStep.jsx exists with default export, BookingFlow imports it at L7 and mounts it at L748.

ui_bugs.issue: When the primary artist profile is loading, the alert renders as "'s profile is still being completed" with an empty leading apostrophe-s because stage_name variable isn't guarded. Not blocking (banner disappears once artist API resolves) but looks polished-away.

action_items: Optional low-priority polish: guard the Step 1 alert-strip text against empty stage_name (BookingFlow.jsx — appears near artist-profile hydration path). Does not block Iter 47 sign-off.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L3167-3248 /event-planner/best-fit is correctly placed BEFORE app.include_router(api) at L3253 — endpoint registers cleanly. Dedupe via seen_ids set works. Busy-day filter uses statuses ['pending_artist','confirmed','started','completed'] (pending_payment intentionally NOT blocked — verified empirically that a booking upgraded to pending_artist via mock payment correctly disappears from best-fit results for that date).

EventPlannerPage.jsx addAllToCart correctly picks the FIRST matched artist as PRIMARY, seeds remaining as secondaries under localStorage['bt_event_cart_<primaryId>'], includes {items,saved_at,from_planner:true}, and hands off with pkg/date/city/event_type query params so BookingFlow can restore.

PaymentStep.jsx (104 lines) is a clean pure-render extraction — all state stays in BookingFlow (paymentMethod, busy, cartPricing, etc. passed as props). Single-vs-multi label branch on isMultiEvent works. Test-mode banner correctly switches to LIVE copy when paymentConfig.razorpay_enabled.
BookingFlow.jsx down from 1086 to 1049 lines — refactor target met (≤1060).
Landing.jsx hero-planner-strip (L171-178) sits between .hero-sub (L168-170) and .hero-cta-row (L179) as spec'd; href='/planner' and copy contains 'Try the AI Event Planner'.

One minor style nit — planner add-all button shows category count from LLM plan.categories (all 5), but actual seeding may match fewer (matched===true). The toast 'Cart seeded with N artist(s)' correctly reports the real count, so no user-facing confusion.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — landing hero strip, planner add-all localStorage seeding, unauth /login redirect, authed booking-cart hydration, Welcome-back toast, all 5 booking steps, PaymentStep chips + banner + pay-now labels (single AND multi-artist) + step5-back all pass

seed_data_creation: One test booking created for busy-day filter test: booking id 72803eac-e705-4fc2-ad8b-8a5f103ff944 (DJ Vortex, 2044-11-12, status=pending_artist) and one more on 2044-12-24 (auto-created by pytest, status=pending_artist). These are on far-future dates (2044) and use TEST_ venue prefix to avoid conflicts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 47 is GREEN end-to-end. Only low-priority follow-up is a small text-guard bug in BookingFlow.jsx step-1 alert-strip ("'s profile is still being completed" when stage_name is empty during hydration). If continuing iterations, note that test bookings for 2044-11-12 and 2044-12-24 with DJ Vortex now exist in pending_artist state — future best-fit tests that use those exact dates for DJ category should account for this or pick different dates. PaymentStep refactor is stable and can be safely extended (e.g. split BookingCart out next if BookingFlow.jsx grows again).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no critical/high bugs to root-cause. All Iter 47 acceptance criteria met.
